entries.source_text: それがわたしの騎士道です！
entries.jp_source: それがわたしの騎士道です！
entries.vi: Đó Là Kỵ Sĩ Đạo Của Tôi!

entries.source_text:
In the command room，%user% and Alicia were doing paperwork，with
Rosa looking on.
entries.jp_source:
司令室には事務仕事をするとアリシア、
そして２人を見守るローザの姿があった。
entries.en_json:
In the command room, and Alicia were doing paperwork, with
Rosa looking on.
entries.vi:
Trong phòng chỉ huy‚ %user% và Alicia đang xử lý giấy tờ‚
còn Rosa thì đứng dõi theo hai người.

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Here's the next document! Please review it!
entries.jp_source: 次の書類です、確認をお願いします！
entries.en_json: Here's the next document! Please review it!
entries.vi: Đây là tài liệu tiếp theo‚ xin Chỉ Huy kiểm tra giúp!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Ugh... I'm still too hungover to think straight... Do these really have
to be done today?
entries.jp_source:
あー……酔って頭が回らん……
これは絶対に今日じゃないとダメなのか……？
entries.en_json:
Ugh... I'm still too hungover to think straight... Do these really have
to be done today?
entries.vi:
Ư… say rượu quá nên đầu óc anh chẳng xoay nổi…
Việc này nhất định phải làm trong hôm nay sao…?

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Absolutely not! You knew better than to drink! It's your own fault!
entries.jp_source:
ダメですよ！
わかっていたのにお酒なんて飲むのが悪いんですっ！
entries.en_json: Absolutely not! You knew better than to drink! It's your own fault!
entries.vi: Không được đâu ạ! Đã biết trước rồi mà còn uống rượu thì lỗi là ở Chỉ Huy đấy!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: I just couldn't say no... Ah，I'm in a real jam...
entries.jp_source:
飲まずにはいられなかったんだよ……。
ああ、困ったな……
entries.en_json: I just couldn't say no... Ah, I'm in a real jam...
entries.vi: Anh không cưỡng lại được mà… Ôi‚ rắc rối thật…

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
If Lord Commander is in trouble，I'll lend my aid! But... is there
anything I can do...?
entries.jp_source:
司令官殿がお困りなら力になります！
ですが……わたしにできることはありますか……？
entries.en_json:
If Lord Commander is in trouble, I'll lend my aid! But... is there
anything I can do...?
entries.vi:
Nếu Chỉ Huy đang gặp khó khăn thì tôi sẽ ra sức giúp! Nhưng… có
việc gì tôi làm được không ạ…?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Of course there is! Just sign this document with my name!
entries.jp_source:
もちろんあるぞ！
この書類に俺の名前で署名しておいてくれ！
entries.en_json: Of course there is! Just sign this document with my name!
entries.vi: Tất nhiên là có! Hãy ký tên anh vào tài liệu này giúp anh!

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Don't even think about forging his signature!
entries.jp_source: 不正はやめてくださいっ！
entries.en_json: Don't even think about forging his signature!
entries.vi: Xin đừng làm giả chữ ký ạ!

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
Rosa，unfortunately，these are all things only the Commander can
process...
entries.jp_source:
ローザさん。残念ですけど、
こちらは司令官しか処理のできないものばかりで……
entries.en_json:
Rosa, unfortunately, these are all things only the Commander can
process...
entries.vi:
Rosa‚ tiếc là những việc này toàn là thứ chỉ Chỉ Huy mới có thể
xử lý…

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Then，if there are any odd jobs，please don't hesitate to call on me!
entries.jp_source: でしたら、雑用があればいつでもお声掛けを！
entries.en_json: Then, if there are any odd jobs, please don't hesitate to call on me!
entries.vi: Vậy nếu có việc lặt vặt nào‚ xin cứ gọi tôi bất cứ lúc nào!

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
Rosa，you don't have to go out of your way for this. It's the
Commander's fault，after all.
entries.jp_source:
ローザさん、わざわざ付き合ってくれなくていいんですよ？
悪いのは司令官ですから。
entries.en_json:
Rosa, you don't have to go out of your way for this. It's the
Commander's fault, after all.
entries.vi:
Rosa‚ cô không cần phải cất công ở lại đâu. Dù sao lỗi cũng là của
Chỉ Huy mà.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: But I was the one who escorted Lord Commander to the tavern.
entries.jp_source: ですが、司令官殿を酒場まで護衛したのはわたしです。
entries.en_json: But I was the one who escorted Lord Commander to the tavern.
entries.vi: Nhưng chính tôi là người đã hộ tống Chỉ Huy đến quán rượu.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I never thought my actions would lead to this... I must take
responsibility for Lord Commander being in such a bind.
entries.jp_source:
わたしのしたことが原因で、こんなことになるなんて……。
司令官殿が困っている責任をとらなければなりません。
entries.en_json:
I never thought my actions would lead to this... I must take
responsibility for Lord Commander being in such a bind.
entries.vi:
Không ngờ việc tôi làm lại dẫn đến chuyện này… Tôi phải chịu
trách nhiệm vì đã khiến Chỉ Huy lâm vào cảnh khó xử.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
You didn't do anything wrong at all. There's no need for you to take
responsibility. I was actually glad you came along with me.
entries.jp_source:
別に悪いことはしてないんだ、責任なんてないだろう。
俺はローザが付き合ってくれて嬉しかったぞ？
entries.en_json:
You didn't do anything wrong at all. There's no need for you to take
responsibility. I was actually glad you came along with me.
entries.vi:
Em đâu có làm gì sai‚ không cần phải chịu trách nhiệm đâu.
Thật ra anh còn vui vì Rosa đã đi cùng anh mà.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Well... yes，I'm glad to hear you say that，Lord Commander.
entries.jp_source:
それは……はい、司令官殿のお気持ちは、
わたしも嬉しく思います。
entries.en_json: Well... yes, I'm glad to hear you say that, Lord Commander.
entries.vi: Điều đó… vâng‚ nghe được tấm lòng của Chỉ Huy‚ tôi cũng thấy rất vui.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: I help those in need because I want to bring joy to others.
entries.jp_source:
皆さんに喜んでもらいたくて、
困っている人を助けているのですから。
entries.en_json: I help those in need because I want to bring joy to others.
entries.vi: Tôi giúp những người gặp khó khăn vì muốn mang niềm vui đến cho mọi người.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Helping those in need is certainly part of chivalry，but you seem to
have a particularly strong conviction about it.
entries.jp_source:
……困っている人を助けるのは騎士道としては真っ当だが、
ローザはそういう思いが強いように見えるな。
entries.en_json:
Helping those in need is certainly part of chivalry, but you seem to
have a particularly strong conviction about it.
entries.vi:
…Giúp người gặp khó khăn đúng là điều chính đáng trong kỵ sĩ đạo‚
nhưng anh thấy Rosa có niềm tin đặc biệt mạnh mẽ về chuyện đó.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Yes，my knightly code might be different from others'.
entries.jp_source: はい、わたしの騎士道は、人とは違うかもしれません。
entries.en_json: Yes, my knightly code might be different from others'.
entries.vi: Vâng‚ kỵ sĩ đạo của tôi có lẽ khác với người khác.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I've already caused you trouble，Lord Commander... Would you mind if
I told you a little about myself?
entries.jp_source:
司令官殿には迷惑をかけてしまいましたし……。
少しだけお話を聞いてもらってもいいですか？
entries.en_json:
I've already caused you trouble, Lord Commander... Would you mind if
I told you a little about myself?
entries.vi:
Tôi đã gây phiền phức cho Chỉ Huy rồi… Chỉ Huy có thể nghe tôi
kể một chút về bản thân không ạ?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Oh，I'd love to hear it. It'll help clear my head.
entries.jp_source:
おお、興味があるぞ。
酔い覚ましに聞かせてくれ。
entries.en_json: Oh, I'd love to hear it. It'll help clear my head.
entries.vi: Ồ‚ anh hứng thú đấy. Kể cho anh nghe để anh tỉnh rượu nào.

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Geez，it's rude to just half-listen，you know?
entries.jp_source: もう、適当に聞いちゃ失礼ですよ？
entries.en_json: Geez, it's rude to just half-listen, you know?
entries.vi: Thật là‚ nghe hời hợt như vậy thì thất lễ lắm đấy ạ?

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: It's fine. It's a very personal matter.
entries.jp_source: いいんです。とても個人的なことですから。
entries.en_json: It's fine. It's a very personal matter.
entries.vi: Không sao đâu. Vì đây là chuyện rất riêng tư mà.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
When I was a child，I lived in a small rural village. The villagers
weren't bad people，but they had some prejudiced views...
entries.jp_source:
わたしは子どものころ、小さな田舎の村に住んでいました。
村人は決して悪い人ではなかったのですが、少し偏った考えで……
entries.en_json:
When I was a child, I lived in a small rural village. The villagers
weren't bad people, but they had some prejudiced views...
entries.vi:
Hồi còn nhỏ‚ tôi sống trong một ngôi làng quê nhỏ. Dân làng
không phải người xấu‚ nhưng suy nghĩ có phần thiên lệch…

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Many believed that female knights and soldiers couldn't be trusted，
and that only men should do the fighting.
entries.jp_source:
女性騎士や女性兵士は信用できない、
男性が戦ってこそ、という意見が多かったんです。
entries.en_json:
Many believed that female knights and soldiers couldn't be trusted,
and that only men should do the fighting.
entries.vi:
Nhiều người cho rằng nữ kỵ sĩ hay nữ binh sĩ không đáng tin‚
và chỉ khi đàn ông chiến đấu mới đúng.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
That's an old-fashioned custom.
I have plenty of strong girls under my command though.
entries.jp_source:
そりゃ古臭い風習だな。
俺の部下には強い女の子がいっぱいだってのに。
entries.en_json:
That's an old-fashioned custom.
I have plenty of strong girls under my command though.
entries.vi:
Đó đúng là tập tục cổ hủ.
Dưới quyền anh có rất nhiều cô gái mạnh mẽ cơ mà.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Lord Commander，you immediately acknowledged me after seeing me
fight. I was truly happy.
entries.jp_source:
司令官殿はわたしの戦いをみて、すぐに認めてくださいました。
とても嬉しかったですよ。
entries.en_json:
Lord Commander, you immediately acknowledged me after seeing me
fight. I was truly happy.
entries.vi:
Chỉ Huy đã nhìn thấy tôi chiến đấu và lập tức công nhận tôi.
Tôi thật sự rất vui.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: ...Then one day，bandits attacked that village.
entries.jp_source: ……ある時、その村が盗賊団に襲われました。
entries.en_json: ...Then one day, bandits attacked that village.
entries.vi: …Rồi một ngày nọ‚ ngôi làng ấy bị một băng cướp tấn công.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
All the men who could fight were felled，and we were threatened that
we must have a large amount of gold ready by their return.
entries.jp_source:
戦える男性はみな倒され、次に来る時までに
たくさんのゴールドを用意しておけと脅されるような状況でした。
entries.en_json:
All the men who could fight were felled, and we were threatened that
we must have a large amount of gold ready by their return.
entries.vi:
Tất cả đàn ông có thể chiến đấu đều bị đánh gục‚ và chúng tôi bị
đe dọa phải chuẩn bị thật nhiều vàng trước lần chúng quay lại.

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
That's awful...
Were you all right?
entries.jp_source:
そんなひどいことが……。
大丈夫だったんですか？
entries.en_json:
That's awful...
Were you all right?
entries.vi:
Thật quá đáng…
Mọi người vẫn ổn chứ?

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Yes. As luck would have it，a female knight happened to stop by the
village.
entries.jp_source:
ええ。
偶然にも、村に１人の女性騎士が立ち寄ってくれたんです。
entries.en_json:
Yes. As luck would have it, a female knight happened to stop by the
village.
entries.vi:
Vâng.
Tình cờ thay‚ có một nữ kỵ sĩ ghé qua ngôi làng.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Despite many villagers saying it was impossible，she brilliantly
defeated the bandits.
entries.jp_source:
村人の多くが無理だと言う中、
彼女は見事に盗賊団を打ち倒して見せました。
entries.en_json:
Despite many villagers saying it was impossible, she brilliantly
defeated the bandits.
entries.vi:
Giữa lúc nhiều dân làng nói rằng điều đó là không thể‚ cô ấy đã
đánh bại băng cướp một cách xuất sắc.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Some people were so surprised they even refused to believe it.
Yet she showed no sign of anger.
entries.jp_source:
驚き、信じない人すらもいたんです。
でも彼女は怒る様子すら見せなかった。
entries.en_json:
Some people were so surprised they even refused to believe it.
Yet she showed no sign of anger.
entries.vi:
Có người kinh ngạc đến mức còn không chịu tin.
Nhưng cô ấy thậm chí chẳng tỏ vẻ tức giận.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
She simply said，'You can rest easy now. I'm glad I could help，' and
then she left.
entries.jp_source:
ただ、もう安心していいと、助けられて良かったと、
そう言って去って行きました。
entries.en_json:
She simply said, 'You can rest easy now. I'm glad I could help,' and
then she left.
entries.vi:
Cô ấy chỉ nói: 'Giờ mọi người có thể yên tâm rồi. Tôi mừng vì đã
giúp được'‚ rồi rời đi.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I admired her noble and proud spirit，and that inspired me to aim to
become a knight.
entries.jp_source:
その気高くて誇りある姿に憧れて、
わたしもまた騎士を目指したんです。
entries.en_json:
I admired her noble and proud spirit, and that inspired me to aim to
become a knight.
entries.vi:
Tôi ngưỡng mộ dáng vẻ cao quý và đầy kiêu hãnh ấy‚ nên cũng nuôi
ước mơ trở thành kỵ sĩ.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
So if someone is in trouble，I want to help them，no matter what's
going on inside their heart.
entries.jp_source:
だから困っている人がいるのなら、
その心の中がどうであれ、助けになりたい。
entries.en_json:
So if someone is in trouble, I want to help them, no matter what's
going on inside their heart.
entries.vi:
Vì vậy nếu có người gặp khó khăn‚ dù trong lòng họ thế nào‚ tôi
vẫn muốn giúp họ.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: That is my chivalry.
entries.jp_source: それがわたしの騎士道なんです。
entries.en_json: That is my chivalry.
entries.vi: Đó chính là kỵ sĩ đạo của tôi.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I want to help those in need，even if they don't want it.
I know it's a somewhat one-sided code of chivalry.
entries.jp_source:
たとえ望まれなくとも、困っている人を助けたい。
すこし偏った騎士道だとは思っています。
entries.en_json:
I want to help those in need, even if they don't want it.
I know it's a somewhat one-sided code of chivalry.
entries.vi:
Tôi muốn giúp người gặp khó khăn dù họ không mong muốn.
Tôi biết đó là một kỵ sĩ đạo có phần thiên lệch.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
But... I never considered that the person I helped would end up
suffering because of it. Was I wrong...?
entries.jp_source:
ただ……助けた結果、本人が困ることになるとは考えていませんでした。
わたしは間違っていたんでしょうか……
entries.en_json:
But... I never considered that the person I helped would end up
suffering because of it. Was I wrong...?
entries.vi:
Nhưng… tôi chưa từng nghĩ rằng sau khi được giúp‚ chính người đó
lại lâm vào khó khăn. Phải chăng tôi đã sai…?

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
Well，there are people who abuse goodwill，just like a certain
Commander?
entries.jp_source: 司令官みたいに、善意を悪用する悪い人もいますからね～？
entries.en_json:
Well, there are people who abuse goodwill, just like a certain
Commander?
entries.vi:
Vì cũng có những người xấu lợi dụng thiện ý‚ như một vị
Chỉ Huy nào đó chẳng hạn nhỉ～?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Stop assuming I'm the villain.
I haven't done anything wrong.
entries.jp_source:
俺を悪人と決めつけた会話はやめてくれ。
別に悪いことはしてないだろう。
entries.en_json:
Stop assuming I'm the villain.
I haven't done anything wrong.
entries.vi:
Đừng nói như thể đã quyết định anh là kẻ xấu vậy.
Anh đâu có làm gì sai.

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Even though you tricked Rosa into helping you drink?
entries.jp_source: ローザさんを騙してお酒を飲むのを手伝わせたのに、ですか？
entries.en_json: Even though you tricked Rosa into helping you drink?
entries.vi: Dù Chỉ Huy đã lừa Rosa giúp mình đi uống rượu ư?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
So now we're having this heart-to-heart，aren't we? We've built a
stronger bond than before，wouldn't you say?
entries.jp_source:
その結果、こうしてローザと本音で話せているんだろう？
酒場に行く前よりもずっと信頼できる関係になれたじゃないか。
entries.en_json:
So now we're having this heart-to-heart, aren't we? We've built a
stronger bond than before, wouldn't you say?
entries.vi:
Kết quả là bây giờ anh và Rosa đang có thể nói thật lòng với nhau
đấy thôi? Chúng ta đã có quan hệ đáng tin cậy hơn trước khi đến quán rượu rồi mà.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Yes，I believe so. I never imagined I'd bare it all to you like this，Lord
Commander.
entries.jp_source:
はい、そう思います。
司令官殿にこうしてすべて話してしまうなんて、思っていませんでした。
entries.en_json:
Yes, I believe so. I never imagined I'd bare it all to you like this, Lord
Commander.
entries.vi:
Vâng‚ tôi cũng nghĩ vậy. Tôi không ngờ mình lại kể hết mọi điều
với Chỉ Huy như thế này.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Ah... no way! Lord Commander，was this your plan all along!
entries.jp_source:
あ……まさか！
司令官殿はこれを狙っていたんですか！？
entries.en_json: Ah... no way! Lord Commander, was this your plan all along!
entries.vi: A… chẳng lẽ nào! Chỉ Huy đã nhắm tới chuyện này ngay từ đầu sao!?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Finally figured it out，huh? It's all going exactly as I intended.
entries.jp_source:
ようやく分かったか。
すべて俺の考え通りなのだよ。
entries.en_json: Finally figured it out, huh? It's all going exactly as I intended.
entries.vi: Cuối cùng em cũng hiểu rồi à. Tất cả đều đúng như anh tính toán.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Incredible...! Lord Commander，you foresaw all of this!
entries.jp_source:
すごいです……！
司令官殿はここまで見通していたんですね！
entries.en_json: Incredible...! Lord Commander, you foresaw all of this!
entries.vi: Tuyệt quá…! Chỉ Huy đã nhìn thấu đến mức này cơ đấy!

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Don't let him fool you，Rosa! He's just talking nonsense!
entries.jp_source:
騙されちゃダメですよ、ローザさん！
司令官は適当なことを言っているだけですから！
entries.en_json: Don't let him fool you, Rosa! He's just talking nonsense!
entries.vi: Đừng để bị lừa đấy‚ Rosa! Chỉ Huy chỉ đang nói bừa thôi!

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: What! Is that really true?
entries.jp_source: ええっ！？　そうなんですか！？
entries.en_json: What! Is that really true?
entries.vi: Ơ!? Thật vậy sao ạ!?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
It's true I wanted to tease Rosa and get closer. And I really did want
a drink.
entries.jp_source:
ローザをからかって、距離を縮めようと思ったのは事実。
酒が飲みたいと思ったのも本当だ。
entries.en_json:
It's true I wanted to tease Rosa and get closer. And I really did want
a drink.
entries.vi:
Đúng là anh muốn trêu Rosa để kéo gần khoảng cách. Và anh cũng
thật sự muốn uống rượu.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Both are true...?
entries.jp_source: どちらも真実なのですか……？
entries.en_json: Both are true...?
entries.vi: Cả hai đều là thật sao…?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
There are bad people who do good deeds，and good people who end
up causing harm. Judging a person's character isn't that simple.
entries.jp_source:
善行をする悪人や、結果として悪をなす善人なんてのもいる。
人間の良し悪しは簡単に判断できるもんじゃないさ。
entries.en_json:
There are bad people who do good deeds, and good people who end
up causing harm. Judging a person's character isn't that simple.
entries.vi:
Có những kẻ xấu làm việc thiện‚ cũng có người tốt cuối cùng lại
gây ra điều xấu. Không thể dễ dàng phán xét con người tốt hay xấu đâu.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Someone who was good when you helped them might change and turn
bad.
entries.jp_source:
助けた時には善人だったのに、
心変わりして悪人になることだってあるんだからな。
entries.en_json:
Someone who was good when you helped them might change and turn
bad.
entries.vi:
Bởi một người lúc được em giúp là người tốt‚ sau đó cũng có thể
đổi lòng mà trở thành kẻ xấu.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: ...It's truly difficult. I don't think I could ever discern it.
entries.jp_source:
……本当に難しいです。
わたしにはとても見抜けそうにありません。
entries.en_json: ...It's truly difficult. I don't think I could ever discern it.
entries.vi: …Thật sự khó quá. Tôi không nghĩ mình có thể nhìn thấu được.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Following the chivalry I believe in，is it okay to keep helping people
as I have been...?
entries.jp_source:
わたしの信じる騎士道にしたがって、
これまで通り人を助けていいんでしょうか……？
entries.en_json:
Following the chivalry I believe in, is it okay to keep helping people as
I have been...?
entries.vi:
Liệu tôi có thể tiếp tục giúp người khác như từ trước đến nay‚
theo kỵ sĩ đạo mà tôi tin tưởng không…?

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text: Rosa...
entries.jp_source: ローザさん……
entries.en_json: Rosa...
entries.vi: Rosa…

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Then I'll be the one to figure that out. I'll judge whether someone is
worthy of your help.
entries.jp_source:
なら俺が見抜いてやろう。
ローザが助けるに値する人間なのか、俺が判断しようじゃないか。
entries.en_json:
Then I'll be the one to figure that out. I'll judge whether someone is
worthy of your help.
entries.vi:
Vậy để anh nhìn thấu thay em. Anh sẽ phán đoán xem người đó có
xứng đáng để Rosa giúp hay không.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Lord Commander，in my stead...!
entries.jp_source: 司令官殿が、わたしの代わりに……！？
entries.en_json: Lord Commander, in my stead...!
entries.vi: Chỉ Huy sẽ thay tôi…!?

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Surely，I'm someone you can trust?
entries.jp_source:
前線基地司令官である俺の目的は世界を救うことだ。
絶対に信じていい相手だろう？
entries.en_json: Surely, I'm someone you can trust?
entries.vi: Mục tiêu của anh với tư cách Chỉ Huy tiền tuyến là cứu thế giới. Anh là người em tuyệt đối có thể tin tưởng‚ đúng không?

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: I see...! Absolutely! Just as I'd expect from the Lord Commander!
entries.jp_source:
なるほど……！　間違いありません！
さすがは司令官殿です！
entries.en_json: I see...! Absolutely! Just as I'd expect from the Lord Commander!
entries.vi: Ra là vậy…! Chắc chắn rồi! Đúng là Chỉ Huy!

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
So from now on，I should trust in you，Lord Commander，and fight for
your cause!
entries.jp_source:
わたしはこれからも司令官殿を信じて、
貴殿のために戦えばいいんですね！
entries.en_json:
So from now on, I should trust in you, Lord Commander, and fight for
your cause!
entries.vi:
Vậy từ nay tôi chỉ cần tin tưởng Chỉ Huy và chiến đấu vì ngài
đúng không ạ!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: That's right. I'll be counting on you from now on，Rosa.
entries.jp_source:
そういうことだ。
今後も働いてもらうぞ、ローザ。
entries.en_json: That's right. I'll be counting on you from now on, Rosa.
entries.vi: Đúng vậy. Từ nay anh vẫn sẽ trông cậy vào em đấy‚ Rosa.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Yes，Lord Commander!
entries.jp_source: はい！
entries.en_json: Yes, Lord Commander!
entries.vi: Vâng‚ thưa Chỉ Huy!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Alright，I'm sobering up. Guess I'll get back to work.
entries.jp_source: さて、酔いも覚めてきたし、仕事に戻るか。
entries.en_json: Alright, I'm sobering up. Guess I'll get back to work.
entries.vi: Được rồi‚ anh cũng tỉnh rượu hơn rồi‚ quay lại làm việc thôi.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: ...Hm，the trash is piling up. I'll go take it out.
entries.jp_source: ……ん、ゴミ箱が埋まってきたな、捨てに行ってくるか。
entries.en_json: ...Hm, the trash is piling up. I'll go take it out.
entries.vi: …Hửm‚ thùng rác đầy lên rồi nhỉ‚ hay là anh đi đổ rác một chuyến.

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
Geez，Commander! You always make me do that stuff，but you only
offer when it's convenient for you! Focus on your work!
entries.jp_source:
もう、司令官！　いつもはわたしにやらせているのに、こんな時にだけ！
そんなことより仕事に集中してください！
entries.en_json:
Geez, Commander! You always make me do that stuff, but you only
offer when it's convenient for you! Focus on your work!
entries.vi:
Thật là‚ Chỉ Huy! Bình thường toàn bắt tôi làm‚ vậy mà chỉ lúc
thế này mới chịu xung phong! Hãy tập trung làm việc đi ạ!

entries.speaker: アリシア
entries.source_text:
Oh! That's right... Rosa! It seems the Commander is in a bind because
the trash is full，isn't he?
entries.jp_source:
あ！　そうだ……ローザさん！
司令官はゴミ箱が一杯になって困っているみたいですよ？
entries.en_json:
Oh! That's right... Rosa! It seems the Commander is in a bind because
the trash is full, isn't he?
entries.vi:
À! Đúng rồi… Rosa! Hình như Chỉ Huy đang gặp khó vì thùng rác
đầy rồi đấy nhỉ?

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text: Yes，I'll help Lord Commander! I'll take it out right away!
entries.jp_source:
はい、司令官殿の助けになります！
すぐに捨ててきますね！
entries.en_json: Yes, I'll help Lord Commander! I'll take it out right away!
entries.vi: Vâng‚ tôi sẽ giúp Chỉ Huy! Tôi sẽ đi đổ ngay đây!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Wh-whoa! You don't need to do that，I'll take it out myself!
entries.jp_source:
お、おおっ！？
そんなことはしなくていいんだ、俺が自分で行ってくるから！
entries.en_json: Wh-whoa! You don't need to do that, I'll take it out myself!
entries.vi: Ơ‚ ơ kìa!? Em không cần làm vậy đâu‚ anh sẽ tự đi mà!

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
No，if it's an order that definitely helps someone，I welcome it! Leave
it to me!
entries.jp_source:
いいえ、こういう絶対に助けになる命令なら大歓迎です！
わたしにお任せください！
entries.en_json:
No, if it's an order that definitely helps someone, I welcome it! Leave
it to me!
entries.vi:
Không‚ nếu đó là mệnh lệnh chắc chắn giúp ích cho người khác thì
tôi rất hoan nghênh! Xin cứ giao cho tôi!

entries.source_text: Rosa dashed out of the command room with incredible speed.
entries.jp_source: ローザは凄まじい勢いで司令室を飛び出していった。
entries.en_json: Rosa dashed out of the command room with incredible speed.
entries.vi: Rosa lao ra khỏi phòng chỉ huy với khí thế khủng khiếp.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
...Ah，the window's a bit dirty. It's bugging me，so I'll just clean it
before getting to work...
entries.jp_source:
……あ、窓が少し汚れてるな。
気になるし、拭き掃除だけしてから仕事を……
entries.en_json:
...Ah, the window's a bit dirty. It's bugging me, so I'll just clean it
before getting to work...
entries.vi:
…À‚ cửa sổ hơi bẩn rồi. Anh thấy để tâm quá‚ nên lau qua một chút
rồi hẵng làm việc…

entries.source_text:
Rosa returned with incredible speed，carrying cleaning tools in both
hands.
entries.jp_source:
猛烈な勢いで戻ってきたローザは、
両手に掃除道具を抱えていた。
entries.en_json:
Rosa returned with incredible speed, carrying cleaning tools in both
hands.
entries.vi:
Rosa quay lại với tốc độ dữ dội‚
hai tay ôm đầy dụng cụ dọn dẹp.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I had a feeling，so I brought the tools! Leave anything that bothers
you to me，Lord Commander，and please attend to your work!
entries.jp_source:
そんな気がしましたので、道具を持ってきました！
気になるところはわたしに任せて、司令官殿はお仕事をどうぞ！
entries.en_json:
I had a feeling, so I brought the tools! Leave anything that bothers
you to me, Lord Commander, and please attend to your work!
entries.vi:
Tôi đã nghĩ có thể sẽ như vậy‚ nên mang dụng cụ tới rồi! Những
chỗ Chỉ Huy thấy để tâm cứ giao cho tôi‚ còn ngài xin hãy làm việc!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text: Ahh，it's about that time I start feeling a little peckish，huh?
entries.jp_source: あー、そろそろ小腹が空いてきた時間だなあ？
entries.en_json: Ahh, it's about that time I start feeling a little peckish, huh?
entries.vi: À‚ hình như cũng đến lúc anh bắt đầu thấy hơi đói rồi nhỉ?

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
I've already placed an order at the cafeteria! I'll go pick it up later，
so please don't worry!
entries.jp_source:
食堂に注文を出しておきました！
のちほど受け取りに行きますのでご心配なく！
entries.en_json:
I've already placed an order at the cafeteria! I'll go pick it up later,
so please don't worry!
entries.vi:
Tôi đã đặt món ở nhà ăn rồi!
Lát nữa tôi sẽ đi lấy‚ nên xin đừng lo!

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
...Fine，I'll get to work. Man，Rosa，you're too competent. It's a
problem.
entries.jp_source:
……分かった、仕事をする。
ったく、ローザが有能で困るよ。
entries.en_json:
...Fine, I'll get to work. Man, Rosa, you're too competent. It's a
problem.
entries.vi:
…Được rồi‚ anh làm việc đây.
Thiệt tình‚ Rosa giỏi quá nên anh cũng khổ.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Have I caused you trouble again? I'm sorry for being such an
inadequate knight.
entries.jp_source:
また困らせてしまいましたか？
至らぬ騎士で申し訳ありません。
entries.en_json:
Have I caused you trouble again? I'm sorry for being such an
inadequate knight.
entries.vi:
Tôi lại khiến Chỉ Huy khó xử nữa sao?
Xin lỗi vì tôi là một kỵ sĩ còn thiếu sót.

entries.speaker: <user>
entries.source_text:
Well，I guess I can let it slide. Just keep working hard for me from
now on.
entries.jp_source:
まあ許してやろうじゃないか。
今後も俺のために励むように。
entries.en_json:
Well, I guess I can let it slide. Just keep working hard for me from
now on.
entries.vi:
Thôi thì anh sẽ tha cho em vậy.
Từ nay cứ tiếp tục cố gắng vì anh nhé.

entries.speaker: ローザ
entries.source_text:
Yes，I will certainly be of help to Lord Commander. That is my
knightly code!
entries.jp_source:
はい、必ず司令官殿の助けになります。
それがわたしの騎士道です！
entries.en_json:
Yes, I will certainly be of help to Lord Commander. That is my knightly
code!
entries.vi:
Vâng‚ tôi nhất định sẽ trở thành trợ lực cho Chỉ Huy.
Đó chính là kỵ sĩ đạo của tôi!
